rss.title: More US Marines and warships to be moved to Middle East, reports say
rss.snippet: The reinforcements will come from an amphibious ready group that is usually based in Japan, an official told CBS, the BBC's US partner.

rss.title: Los Angeles asks for investigation into LA28 Olympics chief over Epstein ties
rss.snippet: The LA city council voted unanimously for an investigation into LA28 chief Casey Wasserman over his Epstein ties.

rss.title: Family of Michigan synagogue suspect killed in Lebanon airstrike, officials say
rss.snippet: The FBI said the suspect had large quantities of fireworks and petrol in his vehicle when it caught fire after ramming a synagogue on Thursday.

arxiv_papers.title: The effects of International Monetary Fund programs: a systematic review with narrative synthesis on poverty, inequality, and social indicators
arxiv_papers.snippet: This systematic review with narrative synthesis examines the social impacts of International Monetary Fund (IMF) programs. arxiv_papers.snippet: This project began by constructing an index of economic insecurity using multiple socioeconomic indicators. podcast: [What would your "deathbed self" tell you today? | Lauren Deeley] What if the key to making better decisions today is getting to know the person you'll become tomorrow? Drawing on psychological research and real-life stories, private wealth advisor Lauren Deeley explores how building a meaningful connection with your "deathbed self" can bring more clarity, joy and intention to the life you're building right now.Learn more about our flagship conference happening
